name: Edith Chang

find.why: You and Antonis Ioannou both connect to the world of documentary filmmaking, making it a wonderful opportunity for you to share insights and inspiration.

find.name: Ellie
find.why: You'd love to meet Ellie because her innovative approach to creativity aligns perfectly with your passion for transforming possibilities for others.
find.match_belief: Making something that wasn't made for you into something that works for everyone—that's the only creativity that matters.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Visibility shifts when the people affected become the storytellers instead of the story. That's all power.
profile.working_on: Piecing together a 60-minute film centered on street musicians' own voices as they navigate and resist criminalization ordinances.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep commitment to empowerment, believing that authentic voices can transform perceptions and reclaim agency in marginalized communities.
